steps.title: Compare the isolation timelines
steps.content: Neon was isolated the same year scientists discovered it, while erbium was isolated 91 years after discovery. The relationship between the sentences is contrast between a quick process and a much slower one.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast signals
steps.content: Choice A signals an example of the same pattern, but erbium shows the opposite pattern. Choice C signals a consequence, though no causal link is given. Choice D signals similarity, which contradicts the timeline contrast. The answer is B.
